records.title: Section 1-1 Purpose
records.text: General Provisions Section 1-1 Purpose The purpose of this ordinance is to promote health, safety, and general welfare by regulating land use and development.
records.excerpt: The purpose of this ordinance is to promote health, safety, and general welfare by regulating land use and development.

records.title: Section 1-2 Authority
records.text: General Provisions Section 1-2 Authority This ordinance is adopted under state enabling legislation and local charter authority.
records.excerpt: This ordinance is adopted under state enabling legislation and local charter authority.

records.title: Section 1-3 Definitions
records.text: General Provisions Section 1-3 Definitions Key terms used throughout the ordinance are defined in this section. Subsection 1-3.A Applicability {#section-1-3-a} Definitions apply to all articles unless otherwise stated.
records.excerpt: Key terms used throughout the ordinance are defined in this section. Subsection 1-3.A Applicability {#section-1-3-a} Definitions apply to all articles unless otherwise stated.

records.title: Section 2-1 Zoning Districts
records.text: Districts and Uses Section 2-1 Zoning Districts The city is divided into zoning districts as shown on the official zoning map.
records.excerpt: The city is divided into zoning districts as shown on the official zoning map.

records.title: Section 2-2 Permitted Uses
records.text: Districts and Uses Section 2-2 Permitted Uses Permitted uses by district are listed in the use tables.
records.excerpt: Permitted uses by district are listed in the use tables.

records.title: Section 2-3 Special Use Permits
records.text: Districts and Uses Section 2-3 Special Use Permits Special uses require review and approval by the zoning board.
records.excerpt: Special uses require review and approval by the zoning board.

records.title: Section 3-1 Lot Area
records.text: Dimensional Standards Section 3-1 Lot Area Minimum lot area standards apply to all principal uses.
records.excerpt: Minimum lot area standards apply to all principal uses.

records.title: Section 3-2 Setbacks
records.text: Dimensional Standards Section 3-2 Setbacks Front, side, and rear setbacks must be met for new construction.
records.excerpt: Front, side, and rear setbacks must be met for new construction.

records.title: Section 3-3 Building Height
records.text: Dimensional Standards Section 3-3 Building Height Maximum building height is regulated by district.
records.excerpt: Maximum building height is regulated by district.
